---
title: "NHSE SW Quarto Reports."
author: "Euan Ives - Insights & Intelligence Team"
date: today
date-format: "D MMMM YYYY"
format:
  html:
    theme: cerulean
    self-contained: true
    standalone: true
    number-sections: false
    grid:
        body-width: 1500px 
editor: visual
---


## Welcome

Welcome to the **NHSE South West Insights & Intelligence** reporting portal. This site serves as a centralized hub for our automated Quarto documentation and data analysis.

::: {.callout-note}
### Quick Start
Use the navigation menu on the left to browse specific reports, methodology notes, and intelligence briefings.
:::

- This is a Quarto website.

    - Welcome

![](https://media0.giphy.com/media/v1.Y2lkPTc5MGI3NjExMnhrYXdnYzhiM3o5b2p6azYzNWRvcTI4OXpncGtrYTRhaDNuODRieiZlcD12MV9pbnRlcm5hbF9naWZfYnlfaWQmY3Q9Zw/KiMBUPZUhUg4HRV6PW/giphy.gif)
